title: Talking Tables Ombre Tapered Dinner Candles Unscented Navy & Blue 2pack,25 cm, Ocean
availability_text: Only 11 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Talking Tables 2 x Ombre Tapered Dinner Candles Navy & Blue Unscented – Elegant Candlesticks for Table Centrepieces, Perfect Christmas Decorations, 25 cm
ABOUT ME: These are ombre navy and blue tapered dinner candles, with a smooth blend of colours and unscented wax for a stylish and versatile decorative touch.
ECO: Made using sustainable wax and fully recyclable packaging, these candles offer an eco-friendly choice for your Christmas decorations and dinner table settings.
SIZE: Each candle measures 25 cm in height, making them perfect for dinner parties, centrepieces, Christmas tablescapes, or mantelpiece candlelight arrangements.
BRITISH BRAND: Talking Tables has become the go-to brand for innovative, sustainable, and design-led products that add fun and style to every occasion.
description: Product Description Create that unmistakable feeling of Christmas togetherness with Talking Tables. Our festive tableware, candles, and garlands bring warmth and charm to every setting — transforming your dining room into a space that feels alive with laughter and love. From rustic napkins to holly-detailed crackers, every piece is designed to help you set a table that tells a story — one of family, comfort, and unforgettable moments shared around the table. Celebrate friendship, food, and laughter with Talking Tables. Our vibrant tableware, candles, and party crowns turn any meal into a moment worth remembering. Mix bold colours and playful touches for a festive setup that feels spontaneous, stylish, and full of joy. Whether it’s Friendsmas or just a reason to gather, Talking Tables helps you create a table that sparks laughter, connection, and stories that last long after the glasses are empty.
